summary: Solid PowerShell + workflow implementation with good structure and error handling. Main issues: (1) Workflow env block (lines 14-19) uses github.event.inputs fallback syntax for push/pull_request triggers where inputs are undefined—this only works safely in workflow_dispatch. Should use conditional logic or separate step-level defaults. (2) Test-Workflow.ps1 lines 65-71 repeat file-existence checks that should refactor into a loop. (3) Relative script paths assume execution from project root. Minor: StringBuilder markdown generation is verbose but functional. The solution handles the core requirements well, runs through act successfully, and demonstrates strong PowerShell practices (Set-StrictMode, error handling, parameter validation).
